title: autobench.continuous.session_complete v1
description: Emitted by the ContinuousModeDaemon at the end of each session. Records initial/final scores, iteration count, total cost and whether the improved harness was promoted to canonical. Source: /autobench.

session_id.description: ULID identifying the autobench session for bus correlation.

initial_score.description: Aggregate score of the canonical harness before this session.

final_score.description: Aggregate score after the session's RSI loop completed.

n_iterations.description: Number of RSI iterations performed during the session.

total_cost_usd.description: Cumulative LLM cost (dollars) reported during the session.

promoted.description: True when the new harness beat canonical and was promoted.

benchmark_source.description: Filesystem path or label identifying the benchmark used.
